AnswerInput.description: Author-submitted answer rule. Exact plaintext is digested before storage.

ChallengeResponse.description: Player-safe challenge response. Answer rules never appear here.

solved.description: Whether the authenticated competitor has already solved it.

CreateTeamResponse.description: One-time team creation response. The invite code is never retrievable later.

charged.description: Score points charged by this request.

replayed.description: True when no second charge was applied.

invite_code.description: Opaque code supplied by a captain.

mfa_code.description: Six-digit TOTP or a single-use recovery code when MFA is enabled.

RecoveryCodesResponse.description: Recovery codes are returned exactly once.

codes.description: Single-use codes. The operator must store these safely.

RecoveryCompleteRequest.description: Complete recovery with a new password.

RecoveryStartRequest.description: Begin recovery without revealing whether an identity exists.

feedback.description: Review feedback, required when requesting changes.

SaveWriteupRequest.description: Player writeup draft or submission input.

submit.description: Enter the organizer review queue after saving.

frozen.description: Post-freeze entries are concealed from players.

hidden.description: Organizer has hidden the public board.

SessionResponse.description: Session bootstrap used by the Svelte client.

csrf_token.description: CSRF value required in `x-csrf-token` on mutations.

current.description: Whether this is the calling session.

required.description: True when no user exists and setup can be completed.

awarded_points.description: Total solve and bonus points awarded.

replayed.description: True when an earlier response was replayed by idempotency key.

answer.description: Flag, regular-expression candidate, or selected choice.

idempotency_key.description: Client-generated UUID reused for safe retries.

answers.description: Integer answers keyed by authored question key.

SurveyQuestionSummaryResponse.description: Aggregate statistics for one survey question.

TotpEnrollmentResponse.description: TOTP enrollment data for an authenticator application.

frozen.description: Conceal new score entries while preserving the last public snapshot.

VisibilityInput.description: Visibility window, division targeting, and unlock graph.

info.description: Typed organizer, player, integration, and realtime API
info.title: Kitsune API
